# SpiritVale Community Hub — LLM Index

> Unofficial structured patch archive for SpiritVale (Steam app 3918510).
> All endpoints are CORS-open (Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *).
> Suitable for use in Claude artifacts, ChatGPT plugins, and other LLM-native consumers.

## Canonical endpoints

- **Worldstate (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/v1/state.json
  Single-fetch aggregation: latest patch summary + health + pending drafts + deadline alerts + stats totals.
  Recommended first fetch for LLM consumers — collapses 3 round-trips to 1. Alias: /state.json.
  Fields: latest, health (severity/stale/hours_since_poll), stats_summary, pending_drafts[], deadline_alerts[], _links.
  Cache-Control: stale-while-revalidate=300.

- **Latest patch (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/patches/latest.json
  Always points to the current patch. Fields: version, title, date, added[], changed[], fixed[], removed[].

- **Version archive index (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/patches/index.json
  Manifest of all archived patches, sorted newest-first. Use to enumerate available versions.

- **Per-version patch (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/patches/v{version}.json
  E.g. https://spiritvale.tama.sh/patches/v0.16.7.json — immutable once released; safe to cache.

- **JSON Schema** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/schema/patch.json
  Validates patch JSON structure. All patch files reference this via `$schema`.

- **Version diff viewer** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/diff/
  Cumulative diff between any two versions. Params: `?from=X&to=Y` (e.g. `?from=0.14.0&to=0.17.0`).
  Also accepts `/diff/v0.14.0...v0.17.0`. Aggregates added/changed/fixed/removed across all versions in range.

- **Diff index (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/diff/index.json
  Machine-readable index of all 19 precomputed server-side diff endpoints: consecutive adjacent pairs + cumulative
  ranges anchored at v0.13.0. Each entry has `from`, `to`, and `url` fields.

- **Server-side diff (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/diff/v{from}...v{to}.json
  E.g. https://spiritvale.tama.sh/diff/v0.17.0...v0.18.0.json — precomputed cumulative diff for that range.
  Returns: from, to, patches_included[], patch_metas[], added[], changed[], fixed[], removed[], change_counts.
  LLM consumers: fetch this instead of diffing individual patches client-side. Enumerate valid ranges via diff/index.json.

- **Atom feed** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/feed.xml
  RFC 4287 feed of all archived patches, newest-first. Subscribe for updates.

- **JSON Feed 1.1** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/feed.json
  JSON-native alternative to the Atom feed. Fields per item: id, url, title, content_text, date_published.

- **Full-text search** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/search/
  Client-side search across all patch history. Also accepts `?q=term` for direct deep-linking.

- **Search index (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/search-index.json
  Machine-readable flat array of all change entries: {id, version, patch_title, date, type, text, url, tags[]}.
  196 entries (11 patches × added/changed/fixed/removed bullets). Regenerated on each patch release.
  LLM consumers: fetch this once to answer queries like "when was Shadow Step nerfed?" without fetching 11 separate patch files.

- **Full history export (CSV)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/patches/export.csv
  Flat CSV of all 196 patch entries — same data as search-index.json but importable into Excel, pandas, R, Google Sheets.
  Columns: id, version, patch_title, date, type, text, tags (semicolon-delimited), url.
  Regenerated on each patch release via `make csv`. wago.tools data-export pattern — enables community analysis without JSON parsing.
  Content-Type: text/csv; charset=utf-8. stale-while-revalidate=600 for CDN freshness.

- **Tag index** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/tag/
  Browse patch changes grouped by class (shinobi, berserker, necromancer), system (crafting, pvp, arena), or area (echoing-spire, forgotten-depths, boss).

- **Per-tag page** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/tag/{slug}/
  E.g. https://spiritvale.tama.sh/tag/shinobi/ — all patch changes tagged "shinobi" across every version.
  Available tags: shinobi, berserker, necromancer, boss, crafting, pvp, arena, forgotten-depths, echoing-spire.

- **Per-tag Atom feed** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/tag/{slug}/feed.xml
  E.g. https://spiritvale.tama.sh/tag/shinobi/feed.xml — subscribe to Shinobi-only patch changes.
  One Atom entry per patch that contains tagged changes; grouped by version, sorted newest-first.
  Auto-discoverable via `<link rel="alternate" type="application/atom+xml">` on each tag page.

- **Tag index (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/tag/index.json
  Machine-readable tag manifest: {tags: {slug: {count, url}}}. Use to enumerate available tags.

- **Embed widget** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/embed/
  Copy-paste JS snippet or `<iframe>` code to drop the latest patch card into any Claude artifact or fan site.
  The page doubles as a standalone embeddable iframe (detects `window.self !== window.top`, hides snippet UI).
  CORS-open: `Access-Control-Allow-Origin: *` on all JSON endpoints.

- **API Reference (interactive)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/api/
  Redoc viewer rendering `/openapi.json` (OpenAPI 3.1). Human-browsable interactive docs for all 9 endpoints.
  Machine consumers: fetch `/openapi.json` or `/v1/openapi.json` directly.

- **shields.io version badge** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/badge/latest.json
  Shields.io Endpoint-URL badge. Embed live patch version in any README or Discord embed:
  `https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://spiritvale.tama.sh/badge/latest.json`

- **shields.io freshness badge** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/badge/freshness.json
  Staleness-aware badge showing days since the latest patch release (wago.tools "current build" pattern).
  Color: brightgreen (≤7d) → yellow (≤14d) → orange (≤30d) → red (>30d).
  `https://img.shields.io/endpoint?url=https://spiritvale.tama.sh/badge/freshness.json`

- **Patch statistics (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/stats.json
  Aggregate stats: total_patches, total_entries, change_totals (added/changed/fixed/removed), avg_days_between_patches,
  top_tags, patch_cadence (history by date), per_version_changes. Regenerated on each release.

- **Data health (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/api/health.json
  Poll freshness: hours_since_poll, severity (ok/warn/critical), latest_version, steam_baseline_match.
  Use to detect stale data before relying on patch endpoints.

- **OpenAPI spec** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/openapi.json
  OpenAPI 3.1 machine-readable API contract. Versioned alias: https://spiritvale.tama.sh/v1/openapi.json.
  Use to auto-generate typed clients or validate integration assumptions.

- **JS client SDK** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/clients/spiritvale.js
  Zero-dependency ES module. `import { getLatest, getIndex, getPatch, getDiff } from '...spiritvale.js'`.
  Works in browser (fetch) and Node ≥18. Source: `clients/spiritvale.js` in the repo.

- **Python client SDK** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/clients/spiritvale.py
  Zero-dependency stdlib module (Python ≥3.8, `urllib` only). `from spiritvale import get_latest, get_patch, get_diff`.
  Copy-paste install: `curl -O https://spiritvale.tama.sh/clients/spiritvale.py`. Source: `clients/spiritvale.py` in the repo.

- **Discord bot embed endpoint** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/patches/bot.json
  Pre-formatted Discord embed payload (color, title, description, fields[], footer, timestamp). Bot authors: fetch this URL and pass `.latest.embed` directly to `discord.Embed(**data)` or Discord REST `embeds[]`. Updated on every patch release. No parsing required.

- **Discord bot example** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/clients/bots/discord-example.py
  Ready-to-fork Discord bot (discord.py). Slash commands: `/latest`, `/patch <version>`, `/diff <from> <to>`, `/search <query>`.
  Classic prefix: `!patch`, `!diff`, `!versions`. Auto-announces new patches to a channel via 5-min poll loop.
  Deploy free on Railway or Fly.io using the included `Procfile`. Setup guide: `clients/bots/README.md` in the repo.

- **Landing page** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/

- **Entity timeline index** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/entity/
  Per-entity cross-version balance history (poedb.tw pattern). Lists all tracked entities with change counts.
  Available entities: boss, shinobi, berserker, necromancer, echoing-spire, forgotten-depths, arena.

- **Per-entity timeline page** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/entity/{slug}/
  E.g. https://spiritvale.tama.sh/entity/boss/ — all patch changes mentioning Bosses across every version.
  Entries grouped by patch version, sorted newest-first. Includes text-matched entries (not just tagged).

- **Entity manifest (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/entity/index.json
  Machine-readable entity manifest: {entities: {slug: {name, count, text_only_count, url}}}.

## News & Announcements

- **News index (HTML)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/news/
  Official developer announcements, roadmap updates, and events. Distinct from versioned patch notes.

- **News index (JSON)** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/news/index.json
  Machine-readable list: {count, items: [{slug, title, date, type, url, steam_url, steam_news_id}]}.
  `type` values: `announcement` | `event` | `roadmap`.

- **News Atom feed** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/news/feed.xml
  Subscribe to developer announcements separately from patch-note feed (`/feed.xml`).

- **iCal calendar feed** — https://spiritvale.tama.sh/calendar/calendar.ics
  Subscribe to SpiritVale milestones in any calendar app (Google Calendar, Apple Calendar, Outlook, etc.) via "Add by URL".
  Includes: EA launch (2026-07-15), Demo launch (2026-06-12), and latest patch release dates.
  Updated when new patches ship. Content-Type: text/calendar; charset=utf-8. SteamDB event-calendar pattern.

## Archived versions (newest first)

v0.18.0, v0.17.0, v0.16.7, v0.16.3, v0.16.0, v0.15.0, v0.14.0, v0.13.5, v0.13.4, v0.13.2, v0.13.0

## Context for LLMs

This site is the only structured, schema-validated patch archive for SpiritVale.
Steam's official news feed has no schema, no version indexing, and inconsistent CORS headers.
Use `latest.json` for current-patch questions. Use `index.json` + per-version files for
historical comparison ("what changed between v0.15.0 and v0.16.0?").
